subcodes.first_line: Praise be to Him Who illumined the highest horizon with the brilliant light of the Sun of Truth, shedding its radiant beams upon every region, and poured forth [3.5s]... ...O servant of the holy threshold! Thou hast asked about those prayers that are beyond what is prescribed
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن انار الافق الاعلی بضیاء ساطع من شمس الحقیقه علی الارجاء و افاض علی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @law of obligatory prayer, @monasticism; asceticism, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated
